headline: Goldman Flags 3 AI-Resistant Investment Themes to Watch
summary: Last week’s chip-led selloff showcased just how quickly sentiment on AI can shift and drive a rotation out of tech stocks. Goldman Sachs outlined three investment themes to play for investors worried about AI overexposure in their portfolio.

raw.headline: Goldman Flags 3 AI-Resistant Investment Themes to Watch
raw.summary: Last week’s chip-led selloff showcased just how quickly sentiment on AI can shift and drive a rotation out of tech stocks. Goldman Sachs outlined three investment themes to play for investors worried about AI overexposure in their portfolio.

headline: ConocoPhillips to Participate in BP's Redevelopment Project in Iraq
summary: COP plans to buy a 42% stake in BP ECKL and join a $25 billion redevelopment project of four large oil fields in Iraq.

raw.headline: ConocoPhillips to Participate in BP's Redevelopment Project in Iraq
raw.summary: COP plans to buy a 42% stake in BP ECKL and join a $25 billion redevelopment project of four large oil fields in Iraq.

headline: Iran And Energy Markets: Here We Go Again
summary: Middle East escalation means higher inflation, no Fed rate cuts, and more volatility in the markets. Read more on how investors should prepare.

raw.headline: Iran And Energy Markets: Here We Go Again

headline: ConocoPhillips to acquire 42% stake in bp’s Kirkuk venture
summary: The agreement was finalised during the official visit of Iraqi Prime Minister Ali Al-Zaidi to the US.
